item.title: Kubernetes
item.description: Kubernetes Objects: Pod ReplicaSet Deployment StatefulSet DaemonSet Job CronJob Service Ingress References

item.title: Kubernetes Jobs
item.description: Kubernetes Jobs For running batch workloads Each Job spins up one or more Pods to process the work Can be run in serial or parallel Often pulling work items from a queue Parallel Patterns Queue with Pod per work item Use to process all work items at once Set .
